lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਲ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸ ਭਏ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੇ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਤਿਆਗੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaval pragaas bhe saadhasange duramat budh tiaagee |2|
lines.english: My heart lotus blossoms forth in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; I have renounced evil-mindedness and intellectualism. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਦੀਨ ਦੈਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har ke gun gaavai simarai deen daiaalaa |
lines.english: One who sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, twenty-four hours a day, and remembers the Lord in meditation, who is Kind to the poor,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਭ ਉਧਰੈ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਗਲ ਜੰਜਾਲਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap tarai sangat sabh udharai binase sagal janjaalaa |3|
lines.english: saves himself, and redeems all his generations; all of his bonds are released. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: charan adhaar teraa prabh suaamee ot pot prabh saath |
lines.english: I take the Support of Your Feet, O God, O Lord and Master; you are with me through and through, God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮਰੀ ਦੇ ਰਾਖਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਹਾਥ ॥੪॥੨॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: saran pario naanak prabh tumaree de raakhio har haath |4|2|32|
lines.english: Nanak has entered Your Sanctuary, God; giving him His hand, the Lord has protected him. ||4||2||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree asattapadeea mahalaa 1 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Ashtpadheeyaa, First Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਹਦਸ ਮਾਲ ਰਖੈ ਜੋ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੋਖ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਸੋ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: trihadas maal rakhai jo naanak mokh mukat so paavai |1|
lines.english: One who keeps his assets safe from the three modes and the ten passions, O Nanak, attains liberation and emancipation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਗਰੀ ਪੰਚ ਚੋਰ ਬਸੀਅਲੇ ਬਰਜਤ ਚੋਰੀ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ek nagaree panch chor baseeale barajat choree dhaavai |
lines.english: In the one village of the body, live the five thieves; they have been warned, but they still go out stealing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਧ ਮੂਲ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਾਖ ਤਲਾਹਾ ਚਾਰਿ ਬੇਦ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: auradh mool jis saakh talaahaa chaar bed jit laage |
lines.english: Its roots extend upwards, and its branches reach down; the four Vedas are attached to it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਜਪਮਾਲੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam ridai japamaalee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Let your rosary be the chanting of the Lord's Name in your heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੇਤਹੁ ਬਾਸੁਦੇਉ ਬਨਵਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: chetahu baasudeo banavaalee |
lines.english: Center your mind on the all-pervading Lord, the Wearer of garlands of the jungles.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਜਾਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਗਨਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਪੁਹਪ ਪਤ੍ਰ ਤਤੁ ਡਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: paarajaat ghar aagan merai puhap patr tat ddaalaa |
lines.english: The Elysian Tree is the courtyard of my house; in it are the flowers, leaves and stems of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਭਾਇ ਜਾਇ ਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਲਿਵ ਜਾਗੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sehaj bhaae jaae te naanak paarabraham liv jaage |2|
lines.english: He alone reaches this tree with ease, O Nanak, who remains wakeful in the Love of the Supreme Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸਿਖਵੰਤੇ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬਿਨਵੈ ਛੋਡਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: sun sikhavante naanak binavai chhoddahu maaeaa jaalaa |
lines.english: Listen, O seekers of Truth - Nanak begs you to renounce the traps of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਸੰਭੂ ਛੋਡਹੁ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਜੰਜਾਲਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sarab jot niranjan sanbhoo chhoddahu bahut janjaalaa |3|
lines.english: Meditate on the self-existent, immaculate Lord, whose Light is pervading everywhere; renounce all your worldly entanglements. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ਏਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੀ ਪੁਨਰਪਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਕਾਲਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: man beechaar ek liv laagee punarap janam na kaalaa |4|
lines.english: Reflect within your mind, that by enshrining love for the One Lord, you shall not be subject to birth and death again. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਕੰਮੁ ਨ ਧੰਧਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਧੰਧੈ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਜੋਗੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tis kaaran kam na dhandhaa naahee dhandhai girahee jogee |5|
lines.english: He is not affected by actions, responsibilities and entanglements; in the entanglements of his household, he maintains the detachment of Yoga. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਗੁਰੂ ਸੋ ਸਿਖੁ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਸੋ ਵੈਦੁ ਜਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਰੋਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: so guroo so sikh katheeale so vaid ji jaanai rogee |
lines.english: He alone is said to be a Guru, he alone is said to be a Sikh, and he alone is said to be a physician, who knows the patient's illness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਤਜੀਅਲੇ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਤਿਸ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh ahankaar tajeeale lobh mohu tis maaeaa |
lines.english: He renounces sexual desire, anger, egotism, greed, attachment and Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਤੁ ਅਵਿਗਤੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: man tat avigat dhiaaeaa gur parasaadee paaeaa |6|
lines.english: Within his mind, he meditates on the reality of the Imperishable Lord; by Guru's Grace he finds Him. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਸਭ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਥੀਅਲੇ ਸੇਤ ਬਰਨ ਸਭਿ ਦੂਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: giaan dhiaan sabh daat katheeale set baran sabh dootaa |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom and meditation are all said to be God's gifts; all of the demons are turned white before him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਕਮਲ ਮਧੁ ਤਾਸੁ ਰਸਾਦੰ ਜਾਗਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੂਤਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: braham kamal madh taas rasaadan jaagat naahee sootaa |7|
lines.english: He enjoys the taste of the honey of God's lotus; he remains awake, and does not fall asleep. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਗੰਭੀਰ ਪਤ੍ਰ ਪਾਤਾਲਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਜੁਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa ganbheer patr paataalaa naanak sarab juaaeaa |
lines.english: This lotus is very deep; its leaves are the nether regions, and it is connected to the whole universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਦੇਸ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਮ ਪੁਨਹਿ ਨ ਗਰਭੰ ਬਿਖੁ ਤਜਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆਇਆ ॥੮॥੧॥
lines.translit: aupades guroo mam puneh na garabhan bikh taj amrit peeaeaa |8|1|
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, I shall not have to enter the womb again; I have renounced the poison of corruption, and I drink in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||8||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Goojaree, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਕਵਨ ਜਾਚਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਤੇ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਅੰਤ ਨ ਪਰਹਿ ਸੁਮਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kavan kavan jaacheh prabh daate taa ke ant na pareh sumaar |
lines.english: Those who beg of God the Great Giver - their numbers cannot be counted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸੀ ਭੂਖ ਹੋਇ ਅਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੂੰ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਚੁ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaisee bhookh hoe abh antar toon samarath sach devanahaar |1|
lines.english: You, Almighty True Lord, fulfill the desires within their hearts. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐ ਜੀ ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਚੁ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ai jee jap tap sanjam sach adhaar |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, chanting, deep meditation, self-discipline and truth are my foundations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਤੇਰੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam dehi sukh paaeeai teree bhagat bhare bhanddaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Bless me with Your Name, Lord, that I may find peace. Your devotional worship is a treasure over-flowing. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲੁ ਥਲੁ ਧਰਣਿ ਗਗਨੁ ਤਹ ਨਾਹੀ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੁ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਤਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jal thal dharan gagan teh naahee aape aap keea karataar |2|
lines.english: In that state, there is no water, land, earth or sky; only the Creator Lord Himself exists. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਨ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ਏਕਾ ਏਕੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sun samaadh raheh liv laage ekaa ekee sabad beechaar |
lines.english: Some remain absorbed in Samaadhi, their minds fixed lovingly on the One Lord; they reflect only on the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਲੋਚਨ ਅਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਏਕਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਸੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sarab drisatt lochan abh antar ekaa nadar su tribhavan saar |3|
lines.english: The eyes within the mind which see everything - with one glance, they see the three worlds. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਦਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਗਨੁ ਨ ਛਾਇਆ ਨਾ ਸੂਰਜ ਚੰਦ ਨ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naa tad maaeaa magan na chhaaeaa naa sooraj chand na jot apaar |
lines.english: There is no intoxication of Maya there, and no shadow, nor the infinite light of the sun or the moon.
